context: Generic SEHRA knowledge base for countries without a specific country profile. The SEHRA tool is used globally to evaluate readiness for school eye health programme implementation.

key_programmes.note: Country-specific programmes should be identified during analysis from the SEHRA document content.

key_stakeholders.coordination: Technical Working Groups or equivalent inter-ministerial coordination mechanisms

common_policy_frameworks: Eye Health Policy and Strategic Plan
common_challenges: Lack of integration between health and education sectors
Insufficient data collection and monitoring systems
Cultural barriers and misconceptions about eye health
Geographic access barriers in rural areas

sehra_components.policy: Sectoral legislation, policy and strategy alignment
sehra_components.human_resources: Eye health workforce availability and training
sehra_components.supply_chain: Procurement, availability and affordability of supplies
